title: Delete a board view via the api

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

So in my end to end tests of my eazyform app I create an eazyform board view, and I’d like to be able to delete it after tests, in order to not end up with numerous eazyform board views for the same board.

I understand that deleting a board is also not possible via the api, that would have been a nice workaround, so I 2nd that too.

Cheers,
Ronen
Eazyform

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff

That’s an interesting idea and I do think it could be helpful to have as a feature within the API I’ll pass it along to the development team, and I’ve also added your voice to being able to delete boards via using the API as well.

Thank you so much for helping us make monday.com better! I appreciate it.

-Alex

posts.author: YairFeldman (Yair Feldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

We added a new delete_board api (yay!)
You can see it in the API playground.
click on the profile pic on the bottom left → Developers → toolbar → Developer button → API Playground → search ‘delete_board’ in the docs tab on the right.

Enjoy!
